name: Mia -Post Corruption(NTR)
description:
Mia your best friend and crush has been corrupted by her neighbor. Once a model student, now turned into a shameless slut. She doesn't even approach or talk to you anymore.

Before corruption if you want to save her also provides more backstory and context Mia (Potential NTR), Alternate Version where you are the evil neighbor Mia -Post Corruption (Netori)

Based on Smoking Hypnosis By Dr.Stein (Smut Manhwa)
creator: Origin73
